label: Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation

node.label: Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation
node.definition: Robustness and out-of-distribution evaluation stress a model under corruptions, subgroup shifts, unseen domains, adversarial inputs, and changing deployment conditions.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation is to connect Probability theory, Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics to downstream capabilities including Adversarial robustness & security testing, Formal verification of models.
examples: substrate for Adversarial robustness & security testing
substrate for Formal verification of models
limitations: Coverage is necessarily incomplete: measured proxies, policies, and test suites cannot enumerate every deployment context or adversary. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory, Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics.

dependencies.rationale: Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Probability theory.
Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics.
Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation measures, constrains, audits, or governs behavior using Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation.
